headline: Is Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) Still Undervalued On Fair Value?
summary: Live Nation Entertainment stock has delivered a strong 135.8% total return over the past 5 years, and both an intrinsic value estimate using a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) approach and market multiples now suggest the shares trade at a discount to that calculated value. A 135.8% return over 5 years signals that investors have already priced in a lot of optimism around Live Nation Entertainment's earnings and cash flow potential. Expectations around continued demand for live events can support...
